name: Adesto Technologies Corporation
description: Adesto Technologies Corporation is a leading provider of innovative, application-specific semiconductors and embedded systems that comprise the essential building blocks of Internet of Things (IoT) edge devices. The company's broad portfolio of low-power non-volatile memory, analog, RF, and mixed-signal technologies, along with its communication processors and embedded systems, enables customers to create highly differentiated, energy-efficient, and secure IoT solutions for industrial, consumer, medical, and communications markets.
